title: CHP: Core
description: A simple core mod for Cave Horror Project.
body:
## A simple core mod for Cave Horror Project. Will add only a few features.

Features made so far:
- Icons for quest rewards _(for version 3.2.1)_
- Announcement about Cave Horror Project: Origins _(for version 3.2.3 and 1.5.1)_
- Welcome message _(for version 3.3)_
- Made fortune work on Ancient Debris _(for version 3.3)_
- Changed recipe for Netherite Ingot _(for version 3.3)_

I don't really suggest using this as a standalone mod as it's only meant to add some custom features into Cave Horror Project.
